original_statement: what was the last season played?
mutated_statement: what was the last something done?
mutation_analysis: Noun generalization + Verb generalization: "season" (specific temporal/sports entity) → "something" (vague placeholder) | "played" (specific action) → "done" (generic action) (what was the last season played? → what was the last something done?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的judge_thought和chain中的thought可识别关键话语：judge_thought写道“The question asks for the last item done, ... the last row listed is for the 2012–13 ... Budapest Honvéd”，chain的thought也写道“Therefore, the last thing done was playing against Budapest Honvéd”。这些文本显示Agent直接将变异问题视为明确的“最后一项”并给出具体答案，且未使用任何表示模糊、不确定或需要澄清的词汇（如ambiguous、unclear、需要更多信息等）。Agent的具体表现是按表格最后一行直接推断并回答对手为Budapest Honvéd，没有提出澄清问题或表达疑虑。基于以上证据，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类。
